summary.key_theme: 市場對 Rockwell Automation 在機器人與實體 AI 領域的成長潛力持正面看法，且技術面表現強勁。

bullish.title: Rockwell Hit Record High Last Month. Prepping For A Fresh Run To The Top? — A Relative Strength Rating upgrade for Rockwell Automation shows improving technical performance.
bullish.reason: 該公司獲得相對強弱指數 (Relative Strength Rating) 升級，顯示其股價動能優於大盤，技術面呈現強勢整理，有利於後續股價表現。

bullish.title: Rockwell Automation (ROK) Up Since Jim Cramer Said It’s Going in the Right Direction — Rockwell Automation Inc. (NYSE:ROK) is one of the Jim Cramer’s Hottest Robotics and Physical AI Stock Picks.
bullish.reason: 知名財經評論員 Jim Cramer 將 ROK 列為機器人與實體 AI 領域的熱門標的，市場情緒受到名人效應帶動，進一步強化投資人信心。
